# Code of Conduct

This project adopts the **[Contributor Covenant, version 2.1][covenant]**.

By participating in this project you agree to uphold that standard.

## Reporting

If you witness or experience behaviour that violates the Code, report it privately:

- Email: **support@vedmint.com**

Reports are handled confidentially. Expect an acknowledgement within 72 hours.

## Enforcement

Maintainers will apply the community impact guidelines described in the [Contributor Covenant][covenant-enforce].
